title: torenia latibracteata
intro: Torenia latibracteata, also known as blue skyflower or blue torenia, is an annual flowering plant species that belongs to the family Linderniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Torenia latibracteata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
